title: tephroseris longifolia subsp. pseudocrispa
intro: Tephroseris longifolia subsp. pseudocrispa, also known as the yellow mountain saw-wort, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Tephroseris longifolia subsp. pseudocrispa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits.
